Hero.subtitle: Borderless Finance. Top up, send transfers, and manage your money worldwide with MurtaaxPay.

Features.card1Desc: Clear your transfer bills seamlessly with zero costs to any Murtaax business center, fast and truly free.
Features.card2Desc: Send money to your loved ones easily through local carriers Zaad, EVC and eDahab.
Features.card3Desc: Banking as strong as you are, with full local support built into our app.
Features.card4Desc: Enjoy all our app features at a $0 cost. Yes, absolutely free for all nationals.

VirtualCard.title: Global spending, simplified.
VirtualCard.description: We allow 100% borderless payments. Shop online anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted, from Mogadishu to London. Pay for Netflix, Amazon, and more with zero hidden fees.
VirtualCard.label: Safe & Secure

Benefits.title: More than just banking.
Benefits.subtitle: Discover features built for the unique needs of the global diaspora community.
Benefits.fastSafeDesc: Instant transfers backed by military-grade encryption to protect your money and details.
Benefits.supportDesc: Our local support team is available whenever you need help, in English, Somali and more.
Benefits.murtaaxIdDesc: Instantly send money to any Murtaax ID with zero hassle. No long bank details needed.
Benefits.virtualWalletDesc: A complete global wallet right on your phone. Secure, reliable, and accessible from anywhere.

Security.title: Security is our DNA
Security.subtitle: We use advanced encryption architecture to ensure every transaction is 100% secure.
Security.protectionDesc: Real-time monitoring and advanced ML prevents fraud before it even happens.

Testimonials.title: Hear from our
Testimonials.quote: MurtaaxPay makes sending money to my family so easy. The exchange rates are fair and the whole process is wonderfully smooth!
Testimonials.name: Mahmoud Amin

Cta.title: Start Sending Money Today
Cta.subtitle: Join thousands of the Somali diaspora community using MurtaaxPay for their financial needs.

About.title: Redefining Finance for the Modern World.
About.subtitle: We started MurtaaxPay with a simple vision: to break down financial borders and provide a seamless, robust platform where your money moves as fast as you do.
About.transactions: Over 2 million trusted transactions happening globally.
About.securityDesc: Your funds are protected by industry-leading encryption and biometric locks.
About.fastDesc: Experience instant global transfers and transactions without delay.
About.guaranteedDesc: We are fully licensed, compliant, and auditable for your total peace of mind.

Services.title: Everything you need, in one super app.
Services.subtitle: From simple transfers to lifestyle rewards. MurtaaxPay brings a complete ecosystem of financial tools directly to you.
Services.capabilityDesc: Empowering your {service} experience with advanced technology.
Services.ctaDesc: Join thousands of users who trust MurtaaxPay for their {service} needs.

request.title: Request Money
request.description: The easiest way to ask for payments globally.
request.content: Send payment requests to anyone, anywhere in the world. Our streamlined process ensures you get paid faster with minimal fees.

exchange.title: Exchange Rates
exchange.content: Get real-time mid-market exchange rates without hidden markups. Switch between 40+ currencies instantly at the best possible price.

savings.title: Savings
savings.content: Watch your money grow with our high-yield savings accounts. Set goals, track progress, and reach your milestones faster.

investments.title: Investments
investments.content: Access global markets and diverse investment opportunities. From stocks to commodities, manage your portfolio in one place.

sadaqah.title: Sadaqah
sadaqah.content: Making charitable giving easier and more transparent. Direct your donations to verified causes and track their impact.

giftcards.title: Gift Cards
giftcards.content: Purchase and send digital gift cards from hundreds of global brands. The perfect gift for friends and family, delivered to their inbox.

refer.title: Refer & Earn
refer.content: Share the MurtaaxPay experience with your network. Earn rewards for every successful referral while helping others master their finances.

vouchers.title: Vouchers
vouchers.content: Pay your bills and recharge utilities with ease. Our voucher system covers water, electricity, internet, and much more.

request.title: Request Money

Footer.about: Built for the global diaspora community. Send money fast, safe, and transparently around the world.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Join our newsletter to get latest updates.
Footer.rights: MurtaaxPay Ltd. All rights reserved. Built for the global community.

PricingPage.subtitle: Experience the world's most transparent and high-performance financial tiering. No secrets. Just pure banking excellence.
PricingPage.freePlanDesc: For the digital nomad starting their global journey. Essential tools, zero costs.
PricingPage.proPlanDesc: For the global citizen demanding iron-clad security and premium flexibility.

CardsPage.subtitle: Experience the world's most advanced virtual and physical card system. Seamlessly integrated into your Murtaax global account.
CardsPage.interactiveP: Express your financial identity with our range of precision-crafted physical and virtual cards.
CardsPage.syncP: Every transaction you make is updated instantly in your pocket. No lag, just pure real-time data.
CardsPage.guardP: Advanced ML monitoring ensures your card is protected 24/7.
CardsPage.ibanP: Your card comes with a dedicated IBAN, connecting you to global payment networks.
CardsPage.syncWalletP: Add your Murtaax card to Apple Pay or Google Pay and spend anywhere in the world.
CardsPage.finalTitle: Ready for the Future of Money?

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: We are on a mission to break down barriers and connect the global diaspora with their homes, safely and instantly.
AboutPage.storyP1: Founded in 2024, MurtaaxPay was born out of a simple observation: sending money across borders is still too slow, too expensive, and too complicated.
AboutPage.storyP2: We've built a world-class team of engineers and finance experts to create a platform that treats your money with the respect it deserves.
